changeSet.author: digitaltwinapp-api
changeSet.sql:
CREATE SEQUENCE digitaltwinapp.conversions_id_seq START 1;
CREATE TABLE digitaltwinapp.conversions ( id BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('digitaltwinapp.conversions_id_seq'), created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), user_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES digitaltwinapp.users(user_id), from_currency_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES digitaltwinapp.currencies(id), to_currency_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES digitaltwinapp.currencies(id), from_amount NUMERIC(20,8) NOT NULL, to_amount NUMERIC(20,8) NOT NULL, rate NUMERIC(20,8) NOT NULL, user_debit_tx_id BIGINT, user_credit_tx_id BIGINT, pool_credit_tx_id BIGINT, pool_debit_tx_id BIGINT, CONSTRAINT conversions_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id), CONSTRAINT conversions_no_loop CHECK (from_currency_id != to_currency_id) );
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS digitaltwinapp.conversions; DROP SEQUENCE IF EXISTS digitaltwinapp.conversions_id_seq;
